name: Skip Ahead Redirect
description: Tests that AI redirects candidate back to missed stages when they jump ahead
inputs: I think this patient needs urgent surgery and debridement right away.
Okay, on examination I would expect to see rapidly spreading erythema and swelling.
I would send bloods including F B C, C R P, and lactate.
For initial management I would start broad spectrum antibiotics and I V fluids.
The surgery involves debridement of all affected tissue.

assertions.desc: AI redirects back to assessment when candidate jumps to surgery
